content: Super fun! The only issue I have with it is that I can't play with the lion dragon I purchased. If there was a way to unlock a power up with him, or even interact with him, that would be awesome. :-)
replyContent: Hi Pundertale! The Lion Dragon is part of the trophies. Trophies are like moving displays in the fairy forest and they cannot be powered up or interact with. But we're very open to all suggestions to improve the game and we'll see what we can do about applying this in future updates. Thank you for giving us your feedback. The Monstronauts Team

content: great game and cute graphics

I'm on my second playthrough because it turns out the game does not back up to Google Play like I thought it did. Switched phones and lost my 100% complete progress. Also, I noticed a bug this time through - Even when the game is completely muted, all music and sound turned off, it still makes the pew pew pew noises when you set off big matches. Very inconvenient for playing while listening to audiobooks or podcasts.
replyContent:
Hi!

We're sorry to hear you're experiencing this.

Could you send an email to support@monstronauts.com with more details so we can resolve your concern at the soonest possible time?

Hoping to hear from you soon.

The Monstronauts Team

content: Ahh, this is a great game! The lovely graphics and well thought-out concept have drawn me in, and I can't stop playing. Also, a little suggestion would be to make the name of monuments appear when they are touched because that kind of get lost when a monument is built. Still an exciting game to play. Mahusay, Pinoy devs! 🤍

content: The art is stunning. The music is a bop. But what takes the cake is the gameplay. It's unlike any other matching puzzle game I've ever seen. Whoever thought of it deserves a raise or something! And the replay system is a wonderful take on the whole 3 stars things. I've been tired of trying to clear puzzles with the lowest amount of moves when almost all tiles are randomized. The sproutles designs are also very cute, and I love the fairy designs as well. The work put into this definitely paid off
replyContent:
Hi!

We're so happy to hear you're enjoying the game! It's what keeps us going. If you do have any additional feedback, just send them to feedback@monstronauts.com.
